response.overview: Wei Zhi, a young woman seen as a jinx since birth, attends the coming-of-age ceremony to detect immortality root bones. Her studies lead her to encounter Yan Yue, the sun deity, who discovers that she is the only one capable of breaking through his impenetrable aura. As a bond forms between them, they uncover a shared past — Wei Zhi is the reincarnation of a powerful phoenix spirit that Yan Yue is duty-bound to destroy.
response.title: 花戎
